title: attendance — model relationships
description: Four owned entities. AttendanceRecord + AbsenceRecord belong to 4 aggregates directly (Tenant + Session + Athlete + AthleteEnrollment) + AttendanceRecord references Pass (SET NULL) + Membership (RESTRICT). AttendancePolicy belongs to Tenant + optional Branch + optional MembershipPlan. LateArrival is a satellite of AttendanceRecord. All RESTRICT outbound except tenant (CASCADE) + consumed_pass_id (RESTRICT — cannot lose the money-side reference). No `application_id` / `organization_id` / `region_id` / `scope_node_id` — forbidden columns.

internal.description: Satellite parent. Late arrivals are cascade-deleted only when the parent attendance is hard-deleted post-retention.

outbound.description: The session being attended. RESTRICT — sessions cannot be archived while attendance records reference them. IMMUTABLE post-create.
The roster row the athlete is attending via. RESTRICT — enrollment cannot be hard-deleted while attendance references remain. IMMUTABLE post-create.

The Pass atomically consumed at check-in. NULL when session.requires_pass=false OR when the athlete used a trial / free / drop-in path. RESTRICT — the money-side reference cannot be lost. IMMUTABLE once set.
The membership from which the Pass was consumed. Denormalised for indexed filtering. NULL for trial / free / drop-in. RESTRICT.
The User (coach / admin / kiosk-authed athlete) who performed the check-in. NULL for pure self-kiosk with anonymous session. RESTRICT for accountability trail.
Branch scope of the policy. NULL = tenant-wide default. RESTRICT — branches cannot be archived while active policies reference them.
Plan scope of the policy. NULL = applies to all plans on the branch. RESTRICT — plans cannot be archived while active policies reference them.
The session the athlete missed. IMMUTABLE.
The roster row the athlete was on when they missed the session. IMMUTABLE.
Guardian / athlete who self-reported (POST /absences/report). NULL for system-detected absences (nightly ReconcileAttendanceJob).
Admin who flipped the absence to excused. NULL until excusal.
Denormalised from parent attendance_record for indexed filtering.

The AttendancePolicy applied at check-in. Snapshot of policy resolution — the policy_id survives even when the policy is later deactivated. RESTRICT — policies cannot be hard-deleted while LateArrival rows reference them.

examples: growth::analytics::AttendancePatternRecord (Wave 8+) — attendance_record_id references AttendanceRecord.id for pattern detection
sports/progress (Wave 8+) — reads attendance rate as a factor in progress tracking (no FK; consumes emitted events)
finance::invoice — reads absence_id via NoShowFeeCharged event payload (no FK; consumes emitted events)
inbound.onDelete: RESTRICT by convention on domain FKs referencing attendance_records.id + absence_records.id — cascade-checks live in AttendanceRecordObserver.saving + AbsenceRecordObserver.saving.

accessor_chain.description: The AttendanceRecord model delegates presentation accessors to its aggregates.

AttendanceRecord.minutes_late: computed diff between checked_in_at and session.starts_at (positive when late)

AttendancePolicy.is_effective_now: is_active AND (effective_from IS NULL OR effective_from <= now()) AND (effective_until IS NULL OR effective_until > now())

notes: AttendanceRecord + AbsenceRecord carry `application_id` INDIRECTLY via their Tenant.
Branch, organization, region cascade through session.venue.branch_id → session → attendance (for AttendanceRecord + AbsenceRecord).
For AttendancePolicy: branch cascade is DIRECT (branch_id column); organization + region cascade through branch.
tenant_id + session_id + athlete_id + athlete_enrollment_id + checked_in_at + checked_in_via are IMMUTABLE post-create on AttendanceRecord.
consumed_pass_id is IMMUTABLE once set — cancel + re-create attendance to re-attribute a pass.
policy_id on LateArrival is IMMUTABLE — it's a snapshot of the policy at check-in time.
